stories.headline: SEB suspects accounts used to circumvent Russia sanctions
stories.summary: Swedish bank flags potential sanctions violations linked to Russia.

stories.headline: Denmark drops Palantir over security fears, Swedish police continue
stories.summary: Denmark exits Palantir contract; Sweden's justice minister dismisses concerns.

stories.headline: Gang rapist escapes deportation
stories.summary: Court rules gang criminal cannot be deported despite conviction.

stories.headline: Mental violence to become criminal offence this summer
stories.summary: New law criminalising psychological abuse passes Swedish parliament.

stories.headline: L party rejects conversion of permanent residence permits
stories.summary: Liberals block proposal to convert permanent residency status.

stories.headline: SSAB fossil-free steel to German defence giant Rheinmetall
stories.summary: Oxelösund steel mill signs letter of intent with Rheinmetall.

stories.headline: Swedish embassy warns citizens after Mexico cartel unrest
stories.summary: Embassy issues alert after cartel leader killed, chaos erupts.

stories.headline: Shingles vaccine may reduce dementia risk
stories.summary: New research links vaccine to lower dementia incidence in Sweden.

stories.headline: Fire in central Stockholm, young man arrested
stories.summary: Arson suspected after early morning blaze on Kungsholmen.

stories.headline: Lund University: Writing style can reveal when you are lying
stories.summary: Thesis shows text patterns expose deception, not just speech.
